commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=95ced0aca34cb53720fed2300f5b823a61c182d7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared 120,000 ms remote media read idle timeout, forwards it through image/image-generation/video media loading, and makes the PDF tool use the shared value with focused tests for image paths.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +46. Total +55 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: no. full runtime repro is present. Source inspection shows current main omits readIdleTimeoutMs on remote image/image-generation loads, but the PR has not shown a real stalled-server failure and recovery path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human maintainer review because the PR has a protected maintainer label, external real behavior proof is mock-only, and the remaining video hunk decision is small but intentional.

target.title: fix: bound remote media reference reads [AI]
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds a shared remote media read idle timeout for media-tool reference downloads.
- Applies the timeout to remote image references used by image read and image generation, and reuses the same shared value for PDF remote reads.
- Keeps local, sandboxed, data URL, and provider URL handoff behavior unchanged.
- Adds focused regression coverage for image reference loading option forwarding.

## Linked context

Which issue does this close?

None linked publicly.

Which issues, PRs, or discussions are related?

None linked publicly.

Was this requested by a maintainer or owner?

Automated tracking workflow.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: remote media reference downloads now receive a per-chunk idle timeout where the OpenClaw tool fetches the referenced media.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on Node/Vitest via the repo test wrapper.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts`
- Evidence after fix: 4 test files passed, 186 tests passed.
- Observed result after fix: image reference loaders forward `readIdleTimeoutMs: 120_000`, and the existing PDF behavior still uses the same timeout.
- What was not tested: live remote media service behavior against a deliberately stalled server.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: focused unit coverage verifies the tool-to-loader contract; CI remains pending.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): existing image reference load tests asserted SSRF/local-root forwarding but did not assert read idle timeout forwarding.

## Tests and validation

Which commands did you run?

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/agents/tools/media-tool-shared.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.ts src/agents/tools/image-tool.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.ts src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts`

What regression coverage was added or updated?

Image read and image generation tests now assert the remote reference load options include the shared idle timeout.

What failed before this fix, if known?

Remote image reference load option forwarding did not include a per-chunk read idle timeout.

If no test was added, why not?

Not applicable.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No, except remote media reads can now fail instead of waiting indefinitely if no data arrives for the idle window.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes, network media fetch behavior is bounded by the existing loader timeout support.

What is the highest-risk area?

Remote media references on very slow servers may now fail once the idle timeout is exceeded.

How is that risk mitigated?

The timeout matches the existing PDF remote media behavior and only applies to HTTP media reads performed by these tool paths.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

Run automated gates and reviewer checks.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

GHSA dry-run, review-pr, autoreview, CI, and final gate verification.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

None yet.

AI-assisted: yes.
target.author: pgondhi987

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
